message:
feat(replay): checkpoint/resume with deterministic failure semantics (ft-og6q6.3.5)

ReplayCheckpointer with configurable event/time interval triggers,
three failure modes (Default/Lenient/Strict), structured ReplayError,
and ReplayReport with deterministic_eq. 27 unit + 24 property tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
